justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative slots when the user's initial request was unavailable and continued to offer relevant options based on the user's evolving preferences.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently managed the conversation, avoiding unnecessary turns and redundant API queries.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear and helpful responses throughout the booking process.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and intelligently expanded its search for available slots after the initial preferences could not be met.
